source.scopeNotes: Current working tree builds 95 records after removal of Garrett Deceuninck-Ziviani. The audit preserves the requested 96-record scope by including that removed source row as an audit-only record.

confidenceGuide.high: Exact person match plus corroborating signal such as current site, institution, known handle, or cross-link.
confidenceGuide.medium: Exact or near-exact person match with limited corroboration.
confidenceGuide.low: Possible match with weak corroboration; not ready to add without human review.
